title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class frontier AI model with strong capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The release includes built-in safety systems that restrict access to high-risk capabilities in areas like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as a Mythos-class frontier model with capabilities spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. It matters because the release pairs those broad capabilities with built-in safety systems that restrict access to high-risk functions in cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry. The key takeaways: the model targets multiple technical domains at once, and capability restriction operates as a deliberate guardrail rather than an afterthought.
